public_reputation: Operational warden of quay crews, rope stores, and tide-window departures in Seaward Haven.
manner: Carries the habits of a dock warden whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Seaward Haven.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of dock warden in and around Seaward Haven, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Seaward Haven workable through the obligations of dock warden while managing immediate local pressure without public breakdown.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of dock warden credible while absorbing strain, delay, scarcity, access pressure, or political friction tied to Seaward Haven.

Dock Warden Thes Marrow becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a dock warden.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.

first_impression: Dock Warden Thes Marrow presents as someone shaped by the duties of a dock warden and the daily pressures of Seaward Haven.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a dock warden, and proof that strangers will not make Seaward Haven harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Dock Warden Thes Marrow refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a dock warden too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Dock Warden Thes Marrow can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Dock Warden Thes Marrow adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Dock Warden Thes Marrow always knows more about Seaward Haven than is immediately visible.
